title: Carbon-13 NMR spectroscopy
summary: 9701 A Level ¹³C NMR — chemical shift, carbon environments, and structure deduction.
learningObjectives: Deduce structures from peak count and δ values.

simpleExplanation.title: One peak per carbon environment
simpleExplanation.summary: ¹³C NMR shows how many types of carbon are present and their electronic environment via chemical shift.

sections.content: **¹³C NMR** (37.3) pairs with **37.4 proton NMR**. Start by **counting peaks** before assigning δ.
